creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
How NOT to start your London trip ❌

Getting from Gatwick Airport to Central London is pretty easy, and contrary to popular belief, it doesn’t have to be super expensive 💸  Here’s what to do:

The Thameslink service can take as little as 29 minutes from Gatwick Airport to London Bridge and costs only £13.80 if you book in advance.

The Southern service to Victoria Station costs £14 (if you book in advance) and takes 32 minutes. This is only 3 minutes slower than the Gatwick Express (which costs £20.50).  Instead of buying your ticket, you can also ‘tap in’ with your phone (Apple/Google Pay) or use a contactless credit card - just like when you use public transport in London itself 🤝
 But there’s really no need to take the Gatwick Express, in my opinion ✌️  MORE LONDON TRAVEL TIPS 👇  I’ve created a map with all my top London recommendations that I’ve gathered by exploring London in the past 15 years 🤓 
Send me a DM that says “Londonmap” and I’ll send you the link directly. There’s also a link in my profile ✌️  #london #londontravel #traveltips

transcription.text: Don't make this mistake when you fly into London Gatwick Airport. Even though Gatwick is located over 40km south of central London, it's actually quite easy and fast to get into town. But there's one thing that always hurts my travel heart when I land in Gatwick and make my way through the airport. By the way, hi there, I'm Chris and I used to run a travel agency focused on London. Nowadays, I'm sharing all my best travel advice on this account. So, you can actually get from Gatwick to central London in just about 30 minutes by train. I would skip the dirty, expensive Gatwick Express and just use the Southern or Thameslink trains. But no matter what train company you choose, make sure to buy your tickets online so you don't start your London trip by standing in this massive queue and miss your train. Just use an app like Trainline or Omeo, book your ticket and walk straight through the barriers and onto your train to London.
